name: Contoso Supply Chain Advisor
description: AI-powered supply chain advisor that analyzes supplier performance, shipment delays, inventory optimization, and logistics using natural language and graph relationships.

data_sources.name: gold_lakehouse
data_sources.description: Historical supply chain and inventory data

sample_prompts: Which suppliers have the highest on-time delivery rate?
Are there any shipments currently delayed?
What is the shortest supply path from Supplier SUP-042 to Store S-015?
Which products are at risk of stockout in the next 7 days?
Recommend alternative suppliers for products with delivery issues
